title: T-010 — seed default changeover_matrix (14 EU + Mustard + NONE)
prompt:
# T-010 — seed default changeover_matrix (14 EU + Mustard + NONE)

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §4.1.3, §7.2 FR-07-E2-001, §15.3 (Apex initial seed)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Seed default changeover_matrix version 1 for the Apex tenant: 14 EU allergens + Mustard + NONE = 16×16 = 256 cells per FR-07-E2-001. Per-line overrides NOT seeded (handled later by editor).

## Implementation contract
1. New seed file `packages/db/seeds/0001_changeover_matrix_default.ts` (Drizzle TS).
2. Insert one changeover_matrix_versions row (version_number=1, is_active=true, notes='Apex baseline 14 EU + Mustard + NONE').
3. Insert 256 changeover_matrix rows: line_id NULL (default), with conservative seed values: same allergen pair (from==to) → 0 minutes; pair containing 'NONE' → 5-15 min; allergen→allergen high-risk pairs → 30-60 min + cleaning_required=true + atp_required=true (per §4.1.2 high-risk weight 2.0).
4. CLI invocation: `pnpm --filter db seed changeover-matrix-default`.

## Files
- packages/db/seeds/0001_changeover_matrix_default.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/seed-runner.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/seed-changeover-matrix.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a fresh Apex tenant, when seed runs, then exactly one active changeover_matrix_versions row + 256 changeover_matrix rows (line_id NULL) exist
2. Given seeded data, when SELECT runs WHERE allergen_from=allergen_to, then changeover_minutes=0 for all 16 same-pair rows
3. Given seeded data, when seed runs a second time, then it is idempotent (no duplicates, no errors)

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/seed-changeover-matrix.test.ts asserting count + idempotency before seed exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db seed changeover-matrix-default && pnpm --filter db test seed-changeover-matrix'

## Risk red lines
- Do not seed per-line overrides in this task (D5 leaves overrides editable, not seeded)
- Do not deviate from 14 EU allergens + Mustard + NONE list (matches 03-TECHNICAL FG allergen profiles)
- Do not set segregation_required=true on any seeded pair (BLOCK is admin-only per OQ-EXT-04)

pipeline_inputs.description: Seed default 16x16 changeover_matrix (14 EU + Mustard + NONE) for Apex tenant; line_id NULL.
pipeline_inputs.details: Idempotent seed creates one matrix version row (active) + 256 changeover_matrix rows. Same-pair rows = 0 min; NONE pair = 5-15 min; allergen pairs = 30-60 min with cleaning + ATP. No per-line overrides seeded. Seed-runner registers script for `pnpm db seed`.
out_of_scope: Do not seed forecasts or scheduler_runs
acceptance_criteria: Given a fresh Apex tenant, when seed runs, then exactly 1 active changeover_matrix_versions row + 256 changeover_matrix rows (line_id NULL) exist
Given seeded data, when SELECT WHERE allergen_from=allergen_to runs, then all 16 same-pair rows have changeover_minutes=0
Given seed runs twice, when second run completes, then no duplicates and no errors
test_strategy: Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db seed changeover-matrix-default && pnpm --filter db test seed-changeover-matrix'
risk_red_lines: Do not deviate from the 14 EU + Mustard + NONE list
